cameras.visual_description: Daylight, dry road, overcast sky with some brightness, coniferous forest, no precipitation, no snow on road
cameras.match_assessment: Forecast and camera agree: mostly clear to partly cloudy, cool (~3-4 C), dry conditions, light winds

cameras.license: Open data, Norwegian Licence for Open Government Data (NLOD)
cameras.visual_description: Arctic tundra landscape, heavy snow cover on ground, cleared road, mixed sun and high cloud, dry surface
cameras.match_assessment: Consistent: near-freezing temperature explains snow on ground, high humidity and overcast match the hazy high-cloud look in frame

cameras.source: NOAA Great Lakes Environmental Research Laboratory
cameras.visual_description: Night shot over Lake Michigan, near-black scene, no visible city lights in frame (overcast/foggy overhead), a single distant light dot
cameras.match_assessment: Dew point equals air temperature at 100% humidity is the textbook fog signature; camera scene being near-black and featureless is consistent with overcast/foggy conditions at night
